name: Banana Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup chopped pecans or walnuts optional
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Sift together flour, baking powder, spices, and salt.
3. Beat oil, sugar, and eggs at medium speed for one minute.
4. Add bananas to the egg mixture. Mix until blended.
5. Add flour mixture, beating at low speed only until blended.
6. Turn into a greased loaf pan.
7. Bake for 1 hour or until a toothpick inserted in the center of the loaf comes out clean.
